name: NexHealth Patient Scheduling and Engagement API
what_it_does: NexHealth patient scheduling and digital intake REST API for real-time appointment booking, digital forms, and patient engagement integrated with practice management systems. Enables AI agents to manage real-time appointment availability and patient self-scheduling for practice scheduling automation, handle digital patient intake form delivery and completion for paperless check-in, access appointment reminder and confirmation automation for show-rate optimization, retrieve patient digital records and intake data for clinical workflow, manage insurance eligibility verification for revenue cycle automation, handle patient recall and waitlist management for practice capacity optimization, access two-way texting and patient communication for care coordination, retrieve patient payment collection and balance reminders for billing automation, manage new patient acquisition and referral tracking for practice growth, and integrate NexHealth with Dentrix, Athenahealth, Epic, and 50+ EHR/PM systems.
use_cases: Delivering intake forms from digital check-in agents
Managing waitlists from scheduling optimization agents
not_for: Hospital enterprise scheduling without small practice focus
Inpatient care without ambulatory appointment booking
best_when: A dental, medical, or mental health practice wanting AI agents to automate patient self-scheduling, digital intake, insurance eligibility, appointment reminders, and patient communication integrated with existing EHR/PM systems.
avoid_when: HIPAA PHI IN DIGITAL INTAKE: NexHealth digital forms collect PHI; automated form data processing and storage must comply with HIPAA security rule; automated intake without BAA with NexHealth creates HIPAA violation. TCPA AUTOMATED PATIENT TEXTS: Automated appointment reminders and marketing texts require appropriate TCPA consent; healthcare exemption applies only to treatment-related texts; recall and marketing texts require prior express written consent. ADA SCHEDULING DISCRIMINATION: Automated appointment booking algorithms must not discriminate against patients based on disability, insurance type, or other protected class; automated slot allocation creating disparate access creates ADA and state discrimination liability. Scheduling algorithm bias — automated appointment slot optimization that systematically disadvantages certain patient populations creates ADA and civil rights disparate impact.

auth.notes: NexHealth uses API key and OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2017. Private (CapitalG/Alphabet, Dragoneer, Sequoia Capital). Healthcare scheduling and digital intake platform. 7,000+ healthcare provider customers. 50+ EHR/PM integrations. Dental, medical, and mental health. Competes with Weave, Solutionreach, and Phreesia for patient engagement.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-provider monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-provider monthly subscription; scheduling and engagement modules
pricing.notes: San Francisco. CapitalG/Dragoneer/Sequoia-backed. Founded 2017. 7,000+ providers. 50+ EHR/PM integrations. Dental, medical, mental health.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer documentation

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA BAA PREREQUISITE: NexHealth processes PHI in intake forms and scheduling data; execute HIPAA BAA with NexHealth before any PHI processing; automated intake without BAA creates HIPAA violation regardless of data security measures

EHR/PM sync bidirectional complexity — NexHealth syncs with 50+ EHR/PM systems bidirectionally; automated scheduling must handle sync latency and conflict resolution between NexHealth and practice management; appointment race conditions in bidirectional sync create double-booking risk

TCPA consent category accuracy — automated patient reminder and recall texts require correct TCPA consent category (treatment exemption vs prior express written consent for marketing); implement consent audit trail per patient communication type

Real-time slot availability race condition — high-demand appointment slots can be reserved between availability check and booking confirmation; implement optimistic locking or conflict handling for popular appointment slots in automated booking

Insurance eligibility verification lag — automated eligibility check timing must occur before appointment, not at time of booking; eligibility status at booking time may differ from day-of-appointment status; implement pre-visit re-verification
Intake form data into EHR — automated routing of NexHealth intake form data into EHR fields must be validated; incorrect field mapping creates clinical data quality issues in patient records
agent_readiness.security_notes: Patient scheduling. HIPAA, SOC2. API key/OAuth2 with scopes. US. PHI and scheduling data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Patient scheduling. HIPAA, SOC2. API key/OAuth2 with scopes. US. PHI and patient scheduling data.
